post.summary: Approve Items Candidates choice for an order
post.description: Approve Items Candidates choice for an order and let the order keep the normal flow
Approve refund request

**WARNING! This action will cancel the order and make a full refund for payment methods that allow it.**

Order cancelation works in a 2-step fashion to prevent cancelations by mistake.

The first time this API is called on an order, it transitions to a state of Cancelation requested.

On the second call, the order will be definitely canceled and there's no way to go back.

Orders in `delivered` or `canceled` status cannot be canceled.

Permissions:
  - **oms:order:request-cancelation** for requesting cancelation
  - **oms:order:approve-cancelation** for approving cancelation
  - **oms:order:cancel** (deprecated) for requesting or approving cancelation

schema.description: Safe checks to avoid accidental cancelations. They must be send all as true to cancel the order

confirmCancelation.description: User confirms that he wants to cancel the order

acknowledgeMoneyWillBeReturned.description: User acknowledges that this may result in money being returned to the customer

acknowledgeNoRollback.description: User acknowledges that there is no rollback for this operation (Required only for definitely cancelation)

motive.description: A motive from the user to comfirm the cancelation

comment.description: A comment from the user to comfirm the cancelation

post.summary: Confirm substitute candidates for a order
post.description:
When no candidates are to be confirmed, send an empty array `[]` in items property.

When candidates have to be confirmed only for some items, send only the items to be confirmed with their candidates.
Subsequently unconfirmed candidates will then be automatically removed from the order.

When order status is `candidatesConfirmationDeadlineExceeded`, the user must have the permission `oms:order:approve-items-candidates` to confirm candidates.

Confirms that the order's payment has been successfully settled in the order's origin, for example in the ecommerce platform.

**Warning**: Use this API with caution. Be sure that the payment has been settled. Otherwise, you may deliver an order without charging the client.

Change the Order coupons by adding and/or removing existing ones

**⚠︎ Important**: This will sync the received coupons with the Order's, the coupons **not sent** in the request, **will be removed from the Order**.

If you want to keep the existing coupons, **send them along with new ones**, **don't send the ones you want to remove**.

get.description:
Retrieve current repacking status.
Use the [Update repacking information API](#operation/postOrderRepacking) to go through and finish the process.

post.description:
Call this API for each step of the repacking process.
The type of step is given by the `action` property and allows different information for each of them.

The actions `createPackage`, `putInsidePackage` and `delete` are saved in a temporal state and won't be applied until the process is finished.

Once you are all set with the repacking process, call the API with the `finish` action to save and process all the previous steps.

To discard the current repacking process, call the API with the `reset` action. Every previous step will be erased and you can start over again.

requestBody.description: The order repacking data by action

post.summary: Update the items of an order
post.description:
Update items and its information from an **Order**.

Can change current items price, quantity or others properties.

**For external picking uses**
- Can remove items.
- Can add new items.

**For not external picking uses**
- Only can update all items

### Pre-picking
  - Valid statuses: `new`, `inAudit`, `readyForPicking`
  - For pre-pick orders have their own internal process for items

### Constraints:
- You cannot remove all the items of an order. If you want to cancel the order, use the [Cancel Order API](#operation/cancelOrder) instead.
- The new total amount of the order cannot exceed the original total amount
